## Type of Change

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed any issues

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested edge cases
- [ ] I have tested error handling

### Security

- [ ] My changes do not introduce any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not hardcoded any secrets or credentials
- [ ] Input validation is properly implemented
- [ ] API endpoints have proper authentication/authorization

### Performance

- [ ] My changes do not negatively impact performance
- [ ] I have considered caching strategies where applicable
- [ ] Database queries are optimized

### Accessibility

- [ ] My changes are accessible (a11y compliant)
- [ ] I have tested with screen readers
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG guidelines
